tier_1.title: Fallen Tree Across the Path
tier_1.description: A massive oak has crashed across the trail, bark still fresh.
tier_1.success: You find a game trail around it. No time lost.
tier_1.failure: The detour through thick brush costs half a day.

tier_1.title: Wolf Pack
tier_1.description: Yellow eyes gleam between the trunks. Low growls echo.
tier_1.success: Spotted early. You light torches and they slink away.
tier_1.failure: The wolves attack from three sides.

tier_1.title: Hidden Herb Grove
tier_1.description: Medicinal plants grow thick in a sunlit clearing.
tier_1.success: You gather healing herbs and wild berries.

tier_1.title: Hunter's Cache
tier_1.description: A canvas-wrapped bundle hangs from a tree branch, half-hidden.
tier_1.success: Dried meat and a waterskin. Someone's emergency stash.
tier_1.failure: You miss it entirely. The forest keeps its secrets.

tier_1.title: Overgrown Path
tier_1.description: The trail vanishes into a wall of brambles and ferns.
tier_1.success: Old blazes on the trees guide you through.
tier_1.failure: Hours of hacking through undergrowth. Exhausting.

tier_2.title: Ettercap Webs
tier_2.description: Thick webs span between the trees. Something large scuttles above.
tier_2.success: You spot the trap and burn a path through safely.

tier_2.title: Fey Crossing
tier_2.description: The forest shimmers. Mushroom rings dot the ground. Time feels wrong.
tier_2.success: You mark your path with iron nails and pass through safely.
tier_2.failure: Hours pass like minutes. You emerge a day later than expected.

tier_2.title: Forester's Camp
tier_2.description: A well-maintained camp with a cold fire pit. Signs of recent use.
tier_2.success: They left dried provisions. Fair trade for firewood.
tier_2.failure: Empty. Whoever was here moved on.

tier_3.title: Green Dragon Territory
tier_3.description: The trees are twisted, bark etched with claw marks. Poison mist clings low.
tier_3.success: You navigate around the dragon's hunting grounds.
tier_3.failure: The dragon has noticed you. Run.

tier_3.title: Blighted Grove
tier_3.description: The trees are dead, bark black and weeping sap. Something corrupted this place.
tier_3.success: You press through quickly, warding off the corruption.
tier_3.failure: The blight saps your strength. Everyone feels weaker.

tier_4.title: Treant Awakening
tier_4.description: The ancient oak you camped beside... moves. Roots tear from the earth.
tier_4.success: You sense the rumbling and evacuate camp before it fully wakes.
tier_4.failure: It attacks. The forest itself fights you.
